templates.title: Showcase Game
templates.description: A Dendry game scaffold based on SDAAH, for learning and modding.

descriptionLocalized.zh-Hant: 基於 SDAAH 的 Dendry 遊戲框架，用於學習與 Mod 開發。

templates.title: Biennio Rosso

descriptionLocalized.zh-Hant: 義大利背景的 SDAAH Mod，完整遊戲含獨有機制與事件。

templates.author: Community (based on SDAAH by Autumn Chen)

templates.title: Dynamic SDAAH
templates.description: An expanded SDAAH mod with dynamic events and extended content.

descriptionLocalized.zh-Hant: 擴展版 SDAAH Mod，含動態事件與延伸內容。

templates.author: Community (based on SDAAH by Autumn Chen)
